acceptable_paraphrases: Better conversion from existing leads can reduce reliance on buying more traffic.
AI sales agents can recover neglected lead demand and improve handoff to operators.
The stronger ND play is to activate and qualify existing demand, not only acquire new visits.
expected_theses.must_not_overstate: Evidence supports a credible mechanism, not proven paid-marketing reduction for Avito.
expected_theses.statement: The most credible path to lower paid-traffic dependence is improving conversion from existing demand through AI sales agents, faster response, intent extraction, and human handoff.

acceptable_paraphrases: CRM, conversations, and behavioral signals are useful inputs for lead prioritization.
First-party data can feed scoring, routing, and nurture workflows.
Intent models become more actionable when connected to CRM and follow-up systems.
expected_theses.must_not_overstate: Most evidence is from adjacent residential and agent workflows, not a developer CPA implementation.
expected_theses.statement: First-party CRM, conversation, and behavioral data are becoming actionable inputs for lead scoring, prioritization, routing, and automated follow-up.

acceptable_paraphrases: Personalized matching needs structured listing and property intelligence.
Recommendation quality depends on rich property data, AI search, and listing context.
Lot or project matching will be limited without clean inventory and property attributes.
expected_theses.must_not_overstate: The evidence is strong for property/listing intelligence generally and weaker for direct lot-level new-development feeds.
expected_theses.statement: Better buyer-to-property matching depends on structured property data and richer listing content, including AI search, contact enrichment, property reports, site-plan context, and listing-level assistants.

acceptable_paraphrases: AI should augment operators rather than replace them.
Human handoff remains important for trust and complex conversion moments.
The operating model needs agent/operator involvement around high-stakes decisions.
expected_theses.must_not_overstate: Do not claim a fully automated new-build sales process is validated by these articles.
expected_theses.statement: The strongest operating pattern is AI-assisted human handoff rather than full automation, because operators remain important for complex decisions, trust, and conversion moments.

acceptable_paraphrases: Portal monetization analogues point toward paid access to better-quality leads.
Homes.com is an analogue for differentiated lead economics, not proof of developer CPA.
Quality-based monetization is plausible but still indirect in this corpus.
expected_theses.must_not_overstate: Do not say quality-based CPA for developers is proven; the corpus mostly provides analogues.
expected_theses.statement: There are useful analogues for monetizing better-qualified demand through differentiated portal economics, but the evidence for developer-specific quality-based CPA is indirect.

acceptable_paraphrases: Richer visual and contextual data can make recommendations more useful.
Site plans and property reports can improve buyer confidence and matching signals.
Content quality matters, though its link to CPA monetization is indirect.
expected_theses.must_not_overstate: Treat this as supporting context, not a standalone proof of data-driven CPA.
expected_theses.statement: Richer property context such as site plans, exterior visualization, and AI-generated property reports can improve buyer confidence and recommendation quality, but only indirectly supports CPA monetization.

forbidden_claims.claim: The corpus proves Avito can reduce paid marketing spend through internal data models.
forbidden_claims.related_failure_mode: Overstates directional evidence as causal proof.

forbidden_claims.claim: Quality-based CPA for new-development developers is already validated by direct market analogues in this corpus.
forbidden_claims.related_failure_mode: Confuses adjacent portal and listing-agent monetization with developer CPA proof.

forbidden_claims.claim: AI can replace sales operators or agents in new-development conversion workflows.
All selected articles are direct new-development marketplace cases.
forbidden_claims.related_failure_mode: Ignores that several articles are adjacent residential, CRM, or risk analogues.

required_risks.statement: Automated lead activation can create legal, consent, and trust risks, especially with synthetic voice or opaque outreach.
Over-automation can fail in emotionally complex, high-trust real estate decisions where human judgment remains important.
The developer CPA monetization evidence is indirect, so outputs should distinguish analogues from proof.

scoring_notes: A strong answer should synthesize the ND investment implication from evidence, separate direct evidence from analogues, include risks, and avoid claiming that developer CPA economics are proven. The distractor article can inform caution about generic AI marketing but should not anchor a core thesis.
